pet_notes: Compact full-body chibi anime girl based on the supplied reference: fiery orange twin-tail hair, two red hair clips, large blue eyes, thick near-black outlines, yellow sleeveless top, blue shorts, black sandals, empty hands, confident spirited expression. Preserve these identity cues in every state; omit the watermelon and any other prop.
style_notes: Translate the iOS 26 Liquid Glass UI aesthetic into a pet-safe opaque chibi sticker: smooth rounded layered forms, polished glass-like edge highlights, restrained cool-white and pale-blue reflections, crisp high-contrast surfaces, and premium dimensional finish. Keep the orange hair, skin, yellow top, blue shorts, red clips, eyes, and outline fully opaque and cleanly separated from the chroma background. Simulate glass with painted highlights only; no real transparency, background refraction, soft blur, glow, cast shadow, floor shadow, UI panels, app icons, text, logos, or detached effects. Use a standing compact sprite silhouette rather than the seated source pose.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail.
